label: Senior Data Engineer — Apex Fintech
notes: 5-days onsite Canary Wharf. No visa sponsorship (right to work required). Salary cap £85k. Core stack: Python, dbt, Snowflake. Kafka a strong plus. Fintech/payments background preferred. Hard eliminates: remote-only (cand-007), salary above cap (cand-008), visa required (cand-009), wrong roles (PMs + ML engineers). Kieran Walsh (cand-010) soft preference for 4-day week but stated it's not a dealbreaker — not eliminated. cand-021 to cand-030 are all software/platform/SRE engineers (not data engineers) — eliminated for wrong discipline.

label: Senior Product Manager — SaaS Growth, CloudBridge
notes: Fully remote, async-first. Visa sponsorship available. B2B SaaS, 5+ years PM. People management required. Salary up to £95k. Preferred: procurement/workflow background, PLG exposure. Hard eliminates: all DE and ML candidates (wrong role). Sienna Park (cand-015) has a soft constraint around B-corp certification that conflicts — not eliminated (soft), but penalised. Vivienne Chen (cand-011) has only 1 direct report and flagged concern about company size. cand-021 to cand-030 are all software/platform/SRE engineers (not PMs) — eliminated for wrong discipline.

label: ML Engineer — Perception Systems, Stratagem Defence
notes: Cambridge, 2 days onsite. Compressed hours available. Salary up to £100k. SC/DV clearance strongly preferred. UK nationals or 5+ years UK PR only — government contracts. Core: PyTorch, computer vision, MLflow. Desirable: ONNX, TensorRT, sensor fusion. Hard eliminates: wrong roles (DE, PM), visa/nationality issues (cand-007 Marco Bellini, cand-009 Raj Mehta), Kwame Adjei (cand-016) has hard constraint requiring net-zero certified employer — Stratagem cannot satisfy this. Nathaniel Brooks (cand-012) is technically excellent but research-oriented and may not commit long-term; ranked 3rd. Ananya Krishnan (cand-019) has highly transferable embedded deployment skills from audio domain. cand-021 to cand-030 are all software/platform/SRE engineers (not ML engineers) — eliminated for wrong discipline. cand-030 (Fatou Diallo) additionally requires visa sponsorship which Stratagem cannot provide.
